data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be conclusively evaluated due to a failure in the LLM evaluation process.
data.assessment: The evidence indicates that the exploratory validation was blocked because the LLM evaluation call failed, preventing any conclusive scoring of the scenario. Without a successful evaluation, it is impossible to determine if the expected result of confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report was achieved. This leads to an inconclusive verdict as no definitive outcome can be established.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement explicit endpoint + assertion contract for this exploratory requirement.
